user: Plan a complete rewrite of the auth system

args.goal: Design a new authentication system using OAuth2 with JWT refresh tokens, replacing the current session-based auth while maintaining backward compatibility with existing API clients
Plan migration from SQLite to PostgreSQL with zero downtime, preserving all data, maintaining API compatibility, and including rollback strategy
Design a plugin architecture for the MCP server that supports hot reload of tools without restarting the server, including plugin discovery, lifecycle management, and sandboxing
Redesign the dreame-mcp server to use event sourcing: every vacuum command becomes an event, state is derived from event stream, with CQRS for read/write separation
Design the cognitive architecture for autonomous Yahboom robot operation: sensor fusion, path planning, obstacle avoidance, ROS 2 integration, and safety constraints

notes: Prefab UI if available, JSON fallback

user: Open a session in the advanced memory server
Start a session for the robotics bridge
Generate documentation for all public functions

args.prompt: Generate comprehensive docstrings for all public functions following Google style, including Args, Returns, Raises, and Examples sections
Audit the codebase for security issues: SQL injection, XSS, improper auth, hardcoded secrets, and unsafe deserialization. Fix any found.
Add structured logging using structlog throughout the codebase: log all API requests, errors, and key business events with proper context
Profile and optimize the database queries: add indexes where needed, fix N+1 queries, and add query result caching for frequently accessed data
Update all dependencies to their latest stable versions, fix any breaking changes, and run the test suite after each update
Add a Typer-based CLI interface with commands for the main operations, proper --help output, and shell completion support
Create a multi-stage Dockerfile: build stage with all dev deps, production stage minimal image. Include docker-compose.yml for local development.
Add integration tests using pytest and httpx: test all API endpoints against a running server instance, using test fixtures for setup/teardown
Add exponential backoff retry logic to all HTTP client calls using tenacity: 3 retries, 1s initial delay, 2x backoff, with specific exception types
Add WebSocket endpoints to the Starlette app for real-time updates: connection management, heartbeat, and message broadcasting

Write an Alembic migration script to add the user_preferences table with columns: id, user_id, key, value, created_at, updated_at
Add Redis caching to the expensive API endpoints: 5-minute TTL for list operations, invalidation on write, using redis-py async client

args.goal: Design a multi-agent system where specialized sub-agents handle different domains (robotics, media, memory) with a coordinator agent routing tasks based on capabilities
Design the architecture for bidirectional VR-to-AI communication: Resonite VR → MCP server → AI agents → VR responses, with low latency and crash recovery
Design a comprehensive fleet monitoring system for 136 MCP servers: health checks, alerting, log aggregation, performance metrics, and automated recovery

args.prompt: Add comprehensive input validation using Pydantic v2: validate all API inputs, add custom validators for business rules, return proper 422 errors with field details
Implement the repository pattern for all database access: abstract interfaces, SQLAlchemy implementations, and in-memory implementations for testing
Add background task processing using asyncio.Queue: task submission API, worker pool, progress tracking, and result retrieval
Run mypy and fix all type errors. Use TypeVar for generics, add overloads where needed, and cast only as last resort.
Add comprehensive OpenAPI documentation: operation descriptions, parameter docs, response schemas with examples, and authentication documentation
Implement circuit breaker pattern for all external API calls: open/half-open/closed states, failure threshold 5, recovery timeout 60s
